new_translation: Một số hóa chất sẽ tự nhiên bị phân hủy theo thời gian.

old_example: She recently earned a master's degree in international marketing and finance from a prestigious global university.
new_example: She recently earned a master's degree from a prestigious university.
new_translation: Cô mới nhận bằng thạc sĩ từ một trường đại học uy tín.

old_example: The position requires candidates to have a university degree in engineering or a related field.
new_example: The position requires candidates to have a university degree in engineering.
new_translation: Vị trí này yêu cầu ứng viên có bằng đại học ngành kỹ thuật.

old_example: Please remember to drink plenty of water to avoid trying to dehydrate during the long international flight.
new_example: Please drink plenty of water to avoid dehydration during the flight.
new_translation: Vui lòng uống nhiều nước để tránh mất nước trong chuyến bay.

old_example: The traveler suffered from severe dehydration after spending several days trekking in the hot tropical jungle recently.
new_example: The traveler suffered from dehydration after trekking in the jungle.
new_translation: Người du hành bị mất nước sau khi thám hiểm trong rừng.
